top_signals.title: Press statement by President von der Leyen in Kyiv
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Kyiv, 15 Jul 2026 Volodymyr, thank you for your warm welcome. I am still so very moved by this morning's ceremony. And by the honour of receiving the Order of Europe. It means a ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ​    ​AsyncAPI npm packages infected with credential-stealing malware
top_signals.summary: Five malicious versions of AsyncAPI packages were published to the Node Package Manager (npm) in a supply-chain attack that delivered a remote access trojan with info-stealing capabilities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan power companies to build or bolster 30 substations to meet AI demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Todd Blanche is asked 'how long you intend to put up with that Kash Patel character?'
top_signals.summary: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

top_signals.title: Alsym Energy, ERITY sign 9 GWh sodium-ion battery deal for mining sector
top_signals.summary: Companies say deal is the largest known sodium-ion battery agreement to date in the global mining industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Almonty Industries, Global Tungsten expand offtake agreement
top_signals.summary: Extends tungsten concentrate produced from Sangdong mine in South Korea by six years.
